title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason reviews multiple AI agent frameworks and tools, including Autoresearch, AutoAgent, Claude Code with a 3-layer memory system, Hermes with self-evolve mechanisms, and Openclaw. The video demonstrates practical implementations and compares their capabilities for building autonomous agents.
